calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(S) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alston L. Lew of the Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. No. 1-925-825-9716 appearing for the defendant;
No other appearance on the matter.

Ruling : The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOSEPH TAN's Amended Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(S) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions in the amount of $750 awarded to Defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.=302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(S) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT JOSEPH TAN's Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(S) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation is Off calendar in the light of the amended motion. Judge Pro-tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(S) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Continued To May-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Defendant Joseph Tan's Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant To Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Person(s) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation as follows: CONTINUED to May 11, 2018. The Court notes that on April 16, 2018, defendant filed an Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contempt For Failure To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents Pursuant to Subpoena, To Compel Airserv Corporation To Produce Persons (s) Most Qualified To Testify At Deposition And To Produce Documents, And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Airserv Corporation, which is set for hearing on May 11, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Continued To May-29-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-04-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
